prestazioni: J35Y6 (3.5L V6 Earth Dreams) engine: Full bolt-on forced induction conversion using a Garrett GTX3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer) paired with a PRL Motorsports J35Y6-specific turbo manifold, Precision Turbo 46mm wastegate, and a custom 3.5" intercooler piping kit from Vibrant Performance. Supporting mods include a K-Tuned J35Y6 ported throttle body, Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, and a Hondata KPro4 standalone ECU with a custom ethanol-compatible tune by Church Automotive Testing.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Pilot Trailsport's 5,000 lb weight), paired with Whiteline front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 18mm rear) and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (part #9.5101G). Braking upgraded to DBA 5000 Series rotors (slotted, 355mm front, 330mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel brake lines from Goodridge.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a Fidanza lightweight flywheel (J35Y6-specific, 18lb), South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily clutch kit, and a Quaife ATB helical LSD in the rear differential. Transmission tuning includes a Hondata TCM flash for the 9-speed ZF 9HP transmission to reduce shift lag and enable manual mode lockout at 6,500 RPM.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (custom-fabricated for the Pilot Trailsport's unibody, extending fenders by 3.5" front and 4" rear) with carbon fiber overfenders and a custom front splitter from Seibon Carbon. Rear diffuser from 3D Carbon (molded to integrate with the stock tow hitch).

Custom 22" Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (9.5" front, 11" rear, +15mm offset) wrapped in Nitto Ridge Grappler 285/40R22 (front) and 305/35R22 (rear) tires. Fender flares painted in DuPont ChromaLux 'Deep Forest Metallic' to match the OEM Trailsport color.

Full custom interior rewrap in Alcantara (Autofab Designs) with red contrast stitching, including door cards, center console, and headliner. Seats replaced with Recaro SR-7F Kevlar bucket seats (custom-molded to retain side airbag functionality) and a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (bolt-in, 6-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly).
